description: irs form w-2 wage and tax statement, extracting the standard lettered and numbered box values for a single consolidated form.

employeeName.description: box e employee name exactly as printed.

employeeSSN.description: box a employee social security number exactly as printed, including masking if present.

employerName.description: box c employer name exactly as printed.

employerEIN.description: box b employer federal id (ein) exactly as printed, including masking if present.

box12.description: box 12 entries, one per filled box 12 slot (12a-12d). exclude empty slots.

amount.description: box 12 dollar amount for the code.

box14.description: box 14 other entries, one per filled line. exclude empty lines.

label.description: box 14 line label or code exactly as printed.

amount.description: box 14 dollar amount for the line.

stateEmployerId.description: box 15 employer's state id number exactly as printed, including masking if present.

box20LocalityName.description: box 20 locality name exactly as printed.
